positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical neo-traditional tattoo style illustration depicting celestial fauna and magical flora. The central subject is a majestic, ornate owl sitting among interconnected vines, illuminated by crescent moons and stylized stars forming a cosmic wreath. The composition must be centered, featuring strong, thick black linework contrasted with deep indigo, ethereal gold, and mint green accents. The style should mimic vintage botanical etching mixed with gothic psychedelic elements, ensuring clean, solid silhouettes and high contrast for optimal apparel printing. Clean, isolated art piece on a neutral background.
